nasb.text: having been filled with the fruit of righteousness which comes through Jesus Christ, to the glory and praise of God.

esv.text: filled with the fruit of righteousness that comes through Jesus Christ, to the glory and praise of God.

cnv.text: 靠著耶穌基督結滿了公義的果子，使　神得著榮耀和讚美。

ccb.text: 并靠着耶稣基督结满仁义的果子，使上帝得到荣耀与颂赞。

csbs.text: 并且充满了那藉着耶稣基督而来的义行果子，归于神的荣耀和称赞。
